phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dove partono le carrozze, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, DOH-veh PAR-toh-noh leh kar-ROT-seh, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: On the east side of the square.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove sono i bagni pubblici, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh SOH-noh ee BAH-nyee POOB-blee-chee, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: In the underground parking, level one.

phrases.text_local: Scusi, dov'è la fermata del bus, per favore?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, doh-VEH lah fer-MAH-tah del BOOS, per fah-VOH-reh

responses.english: Outside the square, towards the sea.
responses.phonetic: foo-OH-ree DAHL-lah pee-AHTS-tsah VEHR-soh EEL MAH-reh
responses.local: Fuori dalla piazza, verso il mare.

phrases.cultural_note: Torquato Tasso (1544–1595) was born in Sorrento and became one of Italy's greatest Renaissance poets, author of Jerusalem Delivered.

responses.english: A great Renaissance poet, author of Jerusalem Delivered.
responses.phonetic: oon GRAN-deh poh-EH-tah del ree-nah-shee-MEN-toh, ow-TOH-reh DEL-lah jeh-roo-sah-LEM-meh lee-beh-RAH-tah.
responses.local: Un grande poeta del Rinascimento, autore della Gerusalemme Liberata.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to catch the ferry to Naples
phrases.text_local: Scusi, dove si prendono i traghetti per Napoli?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, DOH-veh see PREN-doh-noh ee trah-GET-tee per NAH-poh-lee?

responses.english: At the port, going down Via del Mare.
responses.phonetic: al POR-toh, shen-DEN-doh per VEE-ah del MAH-reh.
responses.local: Al porto, scendendo per Via del Mare.
